channel.title: Next.js Blog Platform
channel.description: A high-performance statically generated blog using MDX.

item.title: Deploying Next.js with Docker
item.description: A step-by-step guide to containerizing your Next.js application using Docker and Docker Compose.
item.content:encoded: A step-by-step guide to containerizing your Next.js application using Docker and Docker Compose.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Mastering Tailwind CSS
item.description: Learn how to build modern, responsive layouts effortlessly using Tailwind CSS.
item.content:encoded: Learn how to build modern, responsive layouts effortlessly using Tailwind CSS.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Understanding Server-Side Rendering
item.description: A deep dive into how Server-Side Rendering (SSR) works and when to use it over Static Site Generation (SSG).
item.content:encoded: A deep dive into how Server-Side Rendering (SSR) works and when to use it over Static Site Generation (SSG).
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Introduction to MDX
item.description: Discover the power of combining Markdown with React components using MDX.
item.content:encoded: Discover the power of combining Markdown with React components using MDX.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: My First Blog Post
item.description: This is my very first blog post written in MDX to test the new platform.
item.content:encoded: This is my very first blog post written in MDX to test the new platform.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Getting Started with TypeScript
item.description: A practical introduction to TypeScript for JavaScript developers. Learn types, interfaces, and why TypeScript is worth it.
item.content:encoded: A practical introduction to TypeScript for JavaScript developers. Learn types, interfaces, and why TypeScript is worth it.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: React Hooks Explained
item.description: Master the most important React Hooks: useState, useEffect, useContext, and custom hooks.
item.content:encoded: Master the most important React Hooks: useState, useEffect, useContext, and custom hooks.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Web Performance Optimization Tips
item.description: Practical techniques to make your website faster — from lazy loading and code splitting to image optimization and caching.
item.content:encoded: Practical techniques to make your website faster — from lazy loading and code splitting to image optimization and caching.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Building REST APIs with Node.js
item.description: Learn how to build a clean, well-structured REST API using Node.js and Express, complete with middleware and error handling.
item.content:encoded: Learn how to build a clean, well-structured REST API using Node.js and Express, complete with middleware and error handling.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: CSS Grid vs Flexbox: When to Use Which
item.description: A clear, practical breakdown of CSS Grid and Flexbox — understand their differences and know exactly when to use each layout system.
item.content:encoded: A clear, practical breakdown of CSS Grid and Flexbox — understand their differences and know exactly when to use each layout system.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)

item.title: Understanding Git Branching Strategies
item.description: A guide to popular Git branching strategies like Git Flow, GitHub Flow, and trunk-based development — and when to use each.
item.content:encoded: A guide to popular Git branching strategies like Git Flow, GitHub Flow, and trunk-based development — and when to use each.
item.author: author@example.com (Author Name)
